Brand + Vision

I help innovative brands find their magic, bring big ideas to life, and ultimately stand out from the crowd.

My Story

Throughout 15 years in the corporate world, I have had the opportunity to collaborate with the most incredible people, creating fully-integrated marketing strategies and industry-leading experiences for a diverse array of brands. Most recently, I led marketing for an international salon franchise, from a founder-led entity through an acquisition and transition to a private equity-owned business. During this time, the company scaled from 90 to 600 locations while the community grew from 2,500 to over 20,000 beauty pros. In 2022, I started a consulting business to empower inspired thought leaders to build brands with soul.

Experience
Sola Salons | Chief Marketing Officer (2013–2022)
Motive, A Creative Collective | Executional Mastermind (2011–2013)
Kroenke Sports & Entertainment | Manager, Special Events (2007–2011)
